<!-- Load Academicons -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jpswalsh/academicons@1/css/academicons.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://maxcdn.bootstrapcdn.com/font-awesome/4.3.0/css/font-awesome.min.css">

<!-- Altmetric and Dimensions embeds -->
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://d1bxh8uas1mnw7.cloudfront.net/assets/embed.js"></script>
<script async src="https://badge.dimensions.ai/badge.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.plu.mx/widget-popup.js"></script>

<script>
window.switchLanguage = function (lang) {
  localStorage.setItem("site-lang", lang);
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-lang]").forEach(function (el) {
    el.style.display = el.getAttribute("data-lang") === lang ? "" : "none";
  });

  var enBtn = document.getElementById("lang-en");
  var esBtn = document.getElementById("lang-es");
  if (enBtn && esBtn) {
    enBtn.classList.toggle("active", lang === "en");
    esBtn.classList.toggle("active", lang === "es");
  }
};

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var savedLang = localStorage.getItem("site-lang") || "en";
  var navbar = document.querySelector(".navbar");
  var cvLink = document.querySelector('.navbar a.nav-link[href*="Deneken_CV"]');
  var cvLi = cvLink ? cvLink.closest("li") : null;
  var switcher = document.getElementById("language-switcher");

  if (!switcher) {
    switcher = document.createElement("div");
    switcher.id = "language-switcher";
    switcher.innerHTML =
      '<button id="lang-en" class="lang-btn" type="button">EN</button>' +
      '<button id="lang-es" class="lang-btn" type="button">ES</button>';
  }

  if (cvLi && !switcher.closest("li")) {
    var wrapper = document.createElement("li");
    wrapper.className = "nav-item";
    wrapper.appendChild(switcher);
    cvLi.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, cvLi.nextSibling);
  }

  var enBtn = document.getElementById("lang-en");
  var esBtn = document.getElementById("lang-es");
  if (enBtn && esBtn) {
    enBtn.onclick = function () { window.switchLanguage("en"); };
    esBtn.onclick = function () { window.switchLanguage("es"); };
  }

  function updateNavbarState() {
    if (!navbar) return;
    if (window.scrollY > 20) {
      navbar.style.background = "rgba(255,255,255,0.97)";
      navbar.style.boxShadow = "0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06)";
    } else {
      navbar.style.background = "rgba(255,255,255,0.96)";
      navbar.style.boxShadow = "none";
    }
  }

  updateNavbarState();
  window.addEventListener("scroll", updateNavbarState, { passive: true });
  window.switchLanguage(savedLang);
});
</script>

<!-- 
Load Academicons v1: https://jpswalsh.github.io/academicons/
-->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jpswalsh/academicons@1/css/academicons.min.css">

<link rel="stylesheet" href="http://maxcdn.bootstrapcdn.com/font-awesome/4.3.0/css/font-awesome.min.css">


<!---
The following code are needed to show dimension citation and altmetrics.
https://api.altmetric.com/embeds.html
https://badge.dimensions.ai/
--->

<script type='text/javascript' src='https://d1bxh8uas1mnw7.cloudfront.net/assets/embed.js'></script>

<script async src="https://badge.dimensions.ai/badge.js" charset="utf-8"></script>

<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.plu.mx/widget-popup.js"></script>

<script>
window.switchLanguage = function(lang) {
  localStorage.setItem("site-lang", lang);
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-lang]").forEach((el) => {
    el.style.display = el.getAttribute("data-lang") === lang ? "" : "none";
  });
  const enBtn = document.getElementById("lang-en");
  const esBtn = document.getElementById("lang-es");
  if (enBtn && esBtn) {
    enBtn.classList.toggle("active", lang === "en");
    esBtn.classList.toggle("active", lang === "es");
  }
};

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const savedLang = localStorage.getItem("site-lang") || "en";
  const cvLink = document.querySelector('.navbar a.nav-link[href*="Deneken_CV"]');
  const cvLi = cvLink ? cvLink.closest("li") : null;

  let switcher = document.getElementById("language-switcher");
  if (!switcher) {
    switcher = document.createElement("div");
    switcher.id = "language-switcher";
    switcher.innerHTML =
      '<button id="lang-en" class="lang-btn">🇬🇧 EN</button>' +
      '<button id="lang-es" class="lang-btn">🇪🇸 ES</button>';
  }

  if (cvLi && switcher.parentNode !== cvLi.parentNode) {
    const wrapper = document.createElement("li");
    wrapper.className = "nav-item";
    wrapper.appendChild(switcher);
    cvLi.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, cvLi.nextSibling);
  }

  const enBtn = document.getElementById("lang-en");
  const esBtn = document.getElementById("lang-es");
  if (enBtn && esBtn) {
    enBtn.onclick = () => window.switchLanguage("en");
    esBtn.onclick = () => window.switchLanguage("es");
  }

  window.switchLanguage(savedLang);
});
</script>

<style>
#language-switcher {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  margin-left: 0.35rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

#language-switcher .lang-btn {
  border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #333333;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.6rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
}

#language-switcher .lang-btn:hover {
  border-color: #0d6efd;
  color: #0d6efd;
}

#language-switcher .lang-btn.active {
  background: #0d6efd;
  border-color: #0d6efd;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.navbar .nav-item:has(#language-switcher) {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

@media (max-width: 991px) {
  #language-switcher {
    margin-left: 0;
    margin-top: 0.35rem;
  }
}
</style>
